facts.summary: Default installation scope is 'global' (engine installed once per user, repositories stay state-only).
Manifest declares 5 agents, 22 skills, 10 commands, 9 schemas, 7 prompts.
Repository root contains global-template/ (shipped engine) and project-local-template/ (self-contained mode), plus root installer scripts; docs/ exists but is empty.
Before this discovery, .docgen/evidence contained only .gitkeep (no prior artifacts).
The discovery target is the DocGen Kit source itself; therefore these evidence artifacts describe the documentation tooling rather than a downstream application.
